verses.text: Amoz' tapa Isaiah in Babylon siatna ding tawh kisai a thumuhnate
Mualkolh tungah lim khat lakto un la, galkapte tungah nakpi takin kiko un. Miliante' kongpi-ah amaute va pai-in a simna dingun amaute khut vaan un
Keimah in ka tuamkoihsa mite thu pia khinin, ka hehna thu a semkhia dingin kiphatsakna tawh a lungdam ka mi thahatte ka sam khin hi
Ngai un, mihonpi lungdam bangin mualtungte-ah gamlumna! Ngai un, minamte' kumpi gamte kikhawmin a gamlumna! Vanglian Topa in galdo dingin mihon khat kaikhawm hi
Leitung buppi a susia dingin Topa leh ama hehna galhiamte gamlapi van mong panin hong pai hi
Topa' ni hong naita ahih manin nakpi takin kap un. Vanglianpa' kiang panin suksiatna hong tung ta ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin khut khempeuh zaw-in, mi khempeuh' lungsim tuisuak ding a, amaute lungkia ding uh hi
Amaute in gim mahmahna leh nat velvalna thuak ding uh a, numei nausuak ding bangin na sa ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat lamdang sakna tawh ki-en ding uh a, a maitangte un gimna mel pua ding hi
En un, leitung gamkhing suaksakin, leitung mawhneite a susia dingin hehna leh sinsona tawh nasia takin Topa' ni hong tung ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung aksite leh amau' aksi honpite in khuavak piakhia lo ding hi. Ni a suahtunga kipan mial ding a, kha in zong khuavak taangkhiasak lo ding hi
Leitung mite a tatsiatna hangun gim ka pia ding a, migilote a mawhna hangun gim ka thuaksak ding hi. Mi kihisakte' kiphatsakna beisiang sakin, a kisatheite' kiliatsakna ka niamkhiat ding hi
Mihingte pen kham hoihte sangin a hoihzaw, minam pen Ofir gam khamte sangin a hoihzaw-in ka bawl ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin ka sinso ni-in Vanglian Topa ka hehna hangin vantung lausakin ka lingsak ding a, ama omna panin leitung kisingkhia ding hi
A kidelh sanang leh a cing omlo tuu bangin mi khempeuh amau' mite' lam ciatah kihei-in, amau' gam ciatah tai ding uh hi
A kimu mi peuhmah kithat ding a, a kiman mi peuhmah namsau tawh si ding hi
Amau' muhna mahah a naungekte uh leilak kiden'gawpna ding hi. Amaute' inn kiluhin, a zite uh kibuansak ding hi
En un, ngun leh khamte tawh a lungkimlo Media mite pen amaute a sim dingin ka hanthawn hi
Amau' thalte in tangvalte that ding hi. Amaute in gilsung pana piang naungekte hehpihlo ding uh hi. Amaute' mit in naupangte khasiatlo ding hi
Khaldea mite' hoihna, a kiphatsakpih, kumpi gam a minthang bel Babylon khuapi pen Pasian in Sodom leh Gomorrah a siatsak lai hun bang ding hi

Khang tawntungin tua lai-ah kuamah tenglo ding a, tua lai-ah kuamah om ngei nawnlo ding hi. Arabia mite kuamah in tua lai-ah a puanbuk lamlo ding a, tuucingte kuamah in tua lai-ah a tuute lumsak lo ding hi
Tua munah gamsate lum ding uh a, tua muna innte pen a hawk ganhingte tawh kidim ding hi. Tua munah vasa-kalaoh golpite tengin, tua munah keeldawite laam ding uh hi
Mihaute' innsungah ngiate, kumpi inn nuam sungah se-alte a ham ding uh hi. Babylon khuapi a siat ding hun hong naita a, a ni sawt nawnlo ding hi.
